Skip to contents
germlinevaR 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • germlinevaR walkthrough
  • Changelog

Package index

Readers

Read VEP-, SnpEff-, or dual-annotated VCFs into an MAF-like data.table.

read.gvr()
Convert VEP-annotated germline VCF(s) to an MAF-like data.table
read.gvr.snpeff()
Convert SnpEff-annotated germline VCF(s) to an MAF-like data.table
read.gvr.dual()
Convert dual-annotated germline VCF(s) (VEP + SnpEff) to an MAF-like data.table

Filtering

Modular filtering and novel-variant subsetting.

gvr_filter()
Modular, individually-toggleable filtering of a read.gvr table
gvr_novel()
Filter a read.gvr table down to candidate novel variants

Gene panels

gvr_panel_genes()
Genes for a Disease Panel
gvr_list_panels()
List Available Disease Gene Panels
gvr_hpo_genes()
Resolve HPO phenotype terms to associated genes

Cohort summary

gvr_summary()
Multi-section summary of a germline gvr table (read.gvr / gvr_filter output)
gvr_sum_plots()
Export gvr_summary() plots as standalone image files

Per-gene plots

gvr_plot()
Cohort top-genes variant matrix from a germline gvr table (read.gvr / gvr_filter output)
gvr_lollipop()
Per-gene amino-acid lollipop plot for a germline gvr table
gvr_genepos.plot()
Gene-track lollipop plot on a cDNA axis

Palette and cache utilities

gvr_color_palette()
Generate a Vector of Colors From a Named Palette
gvr_list_palettes()
List All Available Palettes
gvr_domain_cache_clear()
Clear the auto-fetched protein-domain cache used by gvr_lollipop

On this page
